name: Enemosah Stephanie
bio: A writer, kind by heart, passionate by pen. Sugar believes every girl has a story worth hearing. Here to let her voice be heard, one word at a time

name: Ogwu Ezinne Kristal
bio: An ambivert who loves spending quality time with family and close friends. I value mutual respect and appreciation in all relationships

name: Charles Precious
bio: Precious lives by a simple philosophy: show up, lift others up, and extend a helping hand wherever it’s needed most

name: Chibuike Christiana
bio: Christiana advocates for truth and dedicated to speaking up where it matters most and standing firm for girls who need a voice
funFact: I sing a lot, and I'm always happy
